subject: Chemistry
question_text:
The number of species having a square planar shape from the following is __________.
$$\mathrm{XeF}_{4}, \mathrm{SF}_{4}, \mathrm{SiF}_{4}, \mathrm{BF}_{4}^{-}, \mathrm{BrF}_{4}^{-},\left[\mathrm{Cu}\left(\mathrm{NH}_{3}\right)_{4}\right]^{2+},\left[\mathrm{FeCl}_{4}\right]^{2-},\left[\mathrm{PtCl}_{4}\right]^{2-}$$

subject: Chemistry
micro_topic: Electrochemical Series Cell And Their Emf
question_text:
The standard reduction potentials at $$298 \mathrm{~K}$$ for the following half cells are given below:
$$\mathrm{NO}_{3}^{-}+4 \mathrm{H}^{+}+3 \mathrm{e}^{-} \rightarrow \mathrm{NO}(\mathrm{g})+2 \mathrm{H}_{2} \mathrm{O} \quad \mathrm{E}^{\theta}=0.97 \mathrm{~V}$$
$$\mathrm{V}^{2+}(\mathrm{aq})+2 \mathrm{e}^{-} \rightarrow \mathrm{V} \quad\quad\quad \mathrm{E}^{\theta}=-1.19 \mathrm{~V}$$
$$\mathrm{Fe}^{3+}(\mathrm{aq})+3 \mathrm{e}^{-} \rightarrow \mathrm{Fe} \quad\quad\quad \mathrm{E}^{\theta}=-0.04 \mathrm{~V}$$
$$\mathrm{Ag}^{+}(\mathrm{aq})+\mathrm{e}^{-} \rightarrow \mathrm{Ag}(\mathrm{s}) \quad\quad\quad \mathrm{E}^{\theta}=0.80 \mathrm{~V}$$
$$\mathrm{Au}^{3+}(\mathrm{aq})+3 \mathrm{e}^{-} \rightarrow \mathrm{Au}(\mathrm{s}) \quad\quad\quad \mathrm{E}^{\theta}=1.40 \mathrm{~V}$$
The number of metal(s) which will be oxidized by $$\mathrm{NO}_{3}^{-}$$ in aqueous solution is __________.

subject: Chemistry
micro_topic: Reactions Related To Enthalpies And Hesss Law
question_text:
Consider the following data
Heat of combustion of $$\mathrm{H}_{2}(\mathrm{g})\quad\quad=-241.8 \mathrm{~kJ} \mathrm{~mol}^{-1}$$
Heat of combustion of $$\mathrm{C}(\mathrm{s})\quad\quad=-393.5 \mathrm{~kJ} \mathrm{~mol}^{-1}$$
Heat of combustion of $$\mathrm{C}_{2} \mathrm{H}_{5} \mathrm{OH}(\mathrm{l})\quad=-1234.7 \mathrm{~kJ}~{\mathrm{mol}}^{-1}$$
The heat of formation of $$\mathrm{C}_{2} \mathrm{H}_{5} \mathrm{OH}(\mathrm{l})$$ is $$(-)$$ ___________ $$\mathrm{kJ} ~\mathrm{mol}^{-1}$$ (Nearest integer).

question_text:
The equilibrium composition for the reaction $$\mathrm{PCl}_{3}+\mathrm{Cl}_{2} \rightleftharpoons \mathrm{PCl}_{5}$$ at $$298 \mathrm{~K}$$ is given below:
$$\left[\mathrm{PCl}_{3}\right]_{\mathrm{eq}}=0.2 \mathrm{~mol} \mathrm{~L}^{-1},\left[\mathrm{Cl}_{2}\right]_{\mathrm{eq}}=0.1 \mathrm{~mol} \mathrm{~L}^{-1},\left[\mathrm{PCl}_{5}\right]_{\mathrm{eq}}=0.40 \mathrm{~mol} \mathrm{~L}^{-1}$$
If $$0.2 \mathrm{~mol}$$ of $$\mathrm{Cl}_{2}$$ is added at the same temperature, the equilibrium concentrations of $$\mathrm{PCl}_{5}$$ is __________ $$\times 10^{-2} \mathrm{~mol} \mathrm{~L}^{-1}$$
Given : $$\mathrm{K}_{\mathrm{c}}$$ for the reaction at $$298 \mathrm{~K}$$ is 20

question_text: A body cools in 7 minutes from $$60^{\circ} \mathrm{C}$$ to $$40^{\circ} \mathrm{C}$$. The temperature of the surrounding is $$10^{\circ} \mathrm{C}$$. The temperature of the body after the next 7 minutes will be:

subject: Physics
question_text: A dipole comprises of two charged particles of identical magnitude $$q$$ and opposite in nature. The mass 'm' of the positive charged particle is half of the mass of the negative charged particle. The two charges are separated by a distance '$$l$$'. If the dipole is placed in a uniform electric field '$$\bar{E}$$'; in such a way that dipole axis makes a very small angle with the electric field, '$$\bar{E}$$'. The angular frequency of the oscillations of the dipole when released is given by:

question_text: The ratio of speed of sound in hydrogen gas to the speed of sound in oxygen gas at the same temperature is:

For conducting an experiment to verify ohm's law, the most suitable circuit is:

subject: Physics

Assuming Bohr's quantization of momentum and circular orbit, the radius of $$n^{\text {th }}$$ orbit will be proportional to,

subject: Physics
question_text: A child of mass $$5 \mathrm{~kg}$$ is going round a merry-go-round that makes 1 rotation in $$3.14 \mathrm{~s}$$. The radius of the merry-go-round is $$2 \mathrm{~m}$$. The centrifugal force on the child will be

subject: Physics
micro_topic: Acceleration Due To Gravity And Its Variation
question_text: The weight of a body on the surface of the earth is $$100 \mathrm{~N}$$. The gravitational force on it when taken at a height, from the surface of earth, equal to one-fourth the radius of the earth is:

subject: Physics
micro_topic: Escape Speed And Motion Of Satellites
question_text: Choose the incorrect statement from the following:

subject: Physics
question_text:
Experimentally it is found that $$12.8 ~\mathrm{eV}$$ energy is required to separate a hydrogen atom into a proton and an electron. So the orbital radius of the electron in a hydrogen atom is $$\frac{9}{x} \times 10^{-10} \mathrm{~m}$$. The value of the $$x$$ is __________.
$$\left(1 \mathrm{eV}=1.6 \times 10^{-19} \mathrm{~J}, \frac{1}{4 \pi \epsilon_{0}}=9 \times 10^{9} \mathrm{Nm}^{2} / \mathrm{C}^{2}\right.$$ and electronic charge $$\left.=1.6 \times 10^{-19} \mathrm{C}\right)$$

subject: Physics
question_text: Two concentric circular coils with radii $$1 \mathrm{~cm}$$ and $$1000 \mathrm{~cm}$$, and number of turns 10 and 200 respectively are placed coaxially with centers coinciding. The mutual inductance of this arrangement will be ___________ $$\times 10^{-8} \mathrm{H}$$. (Take, $$\pi^{2}=10$$ )

subject: Physics
question_text: As shown in the figure, two parallel plate capacitors having equal plate area of $$200 \mathrm{~cm}^{2}$$ are joined in such a way that $$a \neq b$$. The equivalent capacitance of the combination is $$x \in_{0} \mathrm{~F}$$. The value of $$x$$ is ____________.

subject: Physics
question_text: A body is dropped on ground from a height '$$h_{1}$$' and after hitting the ground, it rebounds to a height '$$h_{2}$$'. If the ratio of velocities of the body just before and after hitting ground is 4 , then percentage loss in kinetic energy of the body is $$\frac{x}{4}$$. The value of $$x$$ is ____________.

subject: Physics
question_text: As shown in the figure, the voltmeter reads $$2 \mathrm{~V}$$ across $$5 ~\Omega$$ resistor. The resistance of the voltmeter is _________ $$\Omega$$.

subject: Physics
question_text: A proton with a kinetic energy of $$2.0 ~\mathrm{eV}$$ moves into a region of uniform magnetic field of magnitude $$\frac{\pi}{2} \times 10^{-3} \mathrm{~T}$$. The angle between the direction of magnetic field and velocity of proton is $$60^{\circ}$$. The pitch of the helical path taken by the proton is __________ $$\mathrm{cm}$$. (Take, mass of proton $$=1.6 \times 10^{-27} \mathrm{~kg}$$ and Charge on proton $$=1.6 \times 10^{-19} \mathrm{C}$$ ).

subject: Physics
question_text: A simple pendulum with length $$100 \mathrm{~cm}$$ and bob of mass $$250 \mathrm{~g}$$ is executing S.H.M. of amplitude $$10 \mathrm{~cm}$$. The maximum tension in the string is found to be $$\frac{x}{40} \mathrm{~N}$$. The value of $$x$$ is ___________.

subject: Physics
question_text: A metal block of mass $$\mathrm{m}$$ is suspended from a rigid support through a metal wire of diameter $$14 \mathrm{~mm}$$. The tensile stress developed in the wire under equilibrium state is $$7 \times 10^{5} \mathrm{Nm}^{-2}$$. The value of mass $$\mathrm{m}$$ is _________ $$\mathrm{kg}$$. (Take, $$\mathrm{g}=9.8 \mathrm{~ms}^{-2}$$ and $$\pi=\frac{22}{7}$$ )

subject: Physics
question_text: A ring and a solid sphere rotating about an axis passing through their centers have same radii of gyration. The axis of rotation is perpendicular to plane of ring. The ratio of radius of ring to that of sphere is $$\sqrt{\frac{2}{x}}$$. The value of $$x$$ is ___________.

subject: Physics
micro_topic: Huygens Principle And Interference Of Light
question_text: A beam of light consisting of two wavelengths $$7000~\mathop A\limits^o $$ and $$5500~\mathop A\limits^o $$ is used to obtain interference pattern in Young's double slit experiment. The distance between the slits is $$2.5 \mathrm{~mm}$$ and the distance between the plane of slits and the screen is $$150 \mathrm{~cm}$$. The least distance from the central fringe, where the bright fringes due to both the wavelengths coincide, is $$n \times 10^{-5} \mathrm{~m}$$. The value of $$n$$ is __________.
